title: Spanish Empanadas Recipe
description: A classic South American pastry filled with delicious Spanish flavors.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the sliced almonds to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Place a tablespoon of the onion and almond mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with a little water, then fold the dough in half to form a half-circle.
Press the edges together to seal the empanada, using a fork to crimp.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little olive oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with a sprinkle of paprika if desired.
